# 🎉  Welcome aThemes to the WPBeginner Family of Products

## Metadata
- **From:** Syed Balkhi - WPBeginner <support@wpbeginner.com>
- **Date:** 2025-04-15 18:30:00
- **Source:** Gmail IMAP
- **UID:** 701

## Body
Hey Muhammad,

Today, I've got an exciting news to share with you!

aThemes, a popular WordPress theme company known for building
beautiful website templates, is joining the WPBeginner family of
products.

Over 130,000+ websites use aThemes' WordPress themes and plugins
to build their online presence, launch online stores, and grow
revenue.

👉 See More About aThemes + Behind the Scenes Story 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..qFHP0H2CiiNMRrAc97ynGNDhpkXERdSmoZInEj6sQqQ )
 👈

aThemes is the company behind two popular WordPress themes,
Sydney and Botiga. Both of them are rated 4.9 out of 5 on
WordPress.org with an impressive 850+ 5-star reviews.

Let's take a quick look:

- Sydney: It is a multipurpose WordPress theme used by
over 100,000 websites. It comes with professionally designed
starter site templates and an easy-to-use template builder that
transforms the way you build websites.

- Botiga: Botiga is a lightweight WooCommerce theme designed for
optimal performance while boosting conversions. It lets you
easily showcase your eCommerce products and customize every part
of your online store, like product pages, checkout pages, and
more in real time.

One of the requests I've been getting from our WPBeginner
community is to offer a FREE WordPress theme that makes it easy
to create stunning websites.

While we already offer premium solutions like ThriveThemes and
SeedProd AI theme builder, I'm really excited to have a
high-quality FREE theme option for our community.

I have written a detailed blog post 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..qFHP0H2CiiNMRrAc97ynGNDhpkXERdSmoZInEj6sQqQ )
 about this acquisition along with my vision for aThemes.

My goal is to create the best WordPress themes on the market
while keeping them affordable and accessible to everyone.

Go ahead and give it a read and let me know your thoughts by
either replying to this email or leaving a comment there on the
blog.

Every time I share news like this, I realize that I'm only able
to do what I love every day because of you, our amazing readers,
and I'm extremely grateful for your support throughout the years.

And I look forward to continuing serving you, and the larger
WordPress / web ecosystem for years to come.

Yours Truly,

Syed Balkhi,
Founder of WPBeginner

You received this email because you subscribed to the WPBeginner

receive our valuable tips, resources, and insider information
about blogging and WordPress :)
